name: Steelswarm Gatekeeper
name_jp: インヴェルズの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>門</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>番</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a "Steelswarm" monster is Tribute Summoned face-up while this card is face-up on the field, you can Normal Summon or Set 1 monster in addition to your Normal Summon or Set that turn.
mnst_eff: If a "Steelswarm" monster is Tribute Summoned face-up while this card is face-up on the field, you can Normal Summon or Set 1 monster in addition to your Normal Summon or Set that turn.
eff: If a "Steelswarm" monster is Tribute Summoned face-up while this card is face-up on the field, you can Normal Summon or Set 1 monster in addition to your Normal Summon or Set that turn.
